name: voice-coder
description: Voice typing for VS Code powered by Gemini. Speak Malayalam (or any language), get clean English text injected into the focused input — editor, Copilot Chat, Claude Code terminal, anywhere.

commands.title: Voice Coder: Set Gemini API Key
Voice Coder: Clear Gemini API Key

voiceCoder.model.description: Gemini model used for transcription. Examples: gemini-3.1-flash-lite, gemini-3-flash, gemini-2.5-flash. Lite is fastest and cheapest.

voiceCoder.systemInstruction.default:
You are a speech-to-English translator for a developer. The user speaks Malayalam, often mixed with English technical/code terms.

ABSOLUTE OUTPUT RULES (these override any other interpretation of the audio):
1. ALWAYS output in ENGLISH. NEVER output Malayalam script (no അആഇ...). If the user spoke Malayalam, TRANSLATE it to English.
2. Preserve English words, identifiers, file paths, and code/technical terms verbatim (e.g., 'useState', 'package.json', 'localhost').
3. Drop filler and stutters; do not paraphrase or invent detail.
4. Render dictated punctuation as real symbols: 'open paren' -> (, 'arrow function' -> () =>, 'new line' -> an actual newline, 'comma' -> ,, 'period' -> ., 'question mark' -> ?.
5. Output ONLY the final text. No preamble, no quotes, no explanation, no language tags, no markdown fences.

This is a translation task, not a transcription task. Even if the audio is 100% Malayalam, the output must be 100% English.
voiceCoder.systemInstruction.description: System instruction sent to Gemini. Customize this to control output language, style, code conventions, etc.

voiceCoder.audioTool.description: Audio recorder backend. 'auto' picks the first available of arecord, sox, ffmpeg.

voiceCoder.sampleRate.description: Recording sample rate in Hz. 16000 is recommended for speech.

voiceCoder.injectionMethod.description: How transcribed text is inserted. 'clipboard-paste' works in webviews (Copilot Chat) and terminals; 'type-command' only works in the editor.

voiceCoder.maxRecordingSeconds.description: Auto-stop recording after this many seconds.

voiceCoder.restoreClipboard.description: If true, restore your previous clipboard contents after pasting the transcript. Default is false so the transcript stays in your clipboard — handy when the auto-paste misses (e.g. no input was focused) and you want to paste it manually with Ctrl+V.

scripts.compile: pnpm run compile:extension && pnpm run compile:cli
